column2: Programme

column9: UFS uses a MODIFIED NSC scale: Level 7 (90-100%) = 8 AP
column11: Levels 1-6 map directly (level = AP points). Life Orientation earns 1 bonus AP point ONLY if achieved at Level 5 (60%) or higher. AP is calculated from 6 academic subjects + LO bonus. Maximum AP = 49. No points awarded for subject achievement below 30%. Selection for all programmes is merit-based from highest AP downward until places are filled — meeting the minimum does not guarantee admission.
